problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
